meaning: n.讲话的人,告诉的人,(银行)出纳员,(投票的)检票员
examples: You don't have to be the joke teller in the group in order to show your sense of humor.
If he had uncomplimentary thoughts about the tale-teller, he kept them to himself.
Using head teller Sylvia as a shield, Sonny exits the bank and begins a dialogue with Moretti.
By then, Patterson Hood had proven himself an indefatigable teller of stories about Southern sinners.
Teller says the acquisition by TrustedID will give his operation the resources to expand its reach.
